notes: Live portal evidence in KotaSAS / Taman Kota Sri Ahmad Shah shows 1.5-storey semi-D asking prices clustered around RM780k-RM830k for ~3,156–4,004 sqft homes, with a lower recent semi-D asking comp at RM598k for a 2,800 sqft built-up unit. DurianProperty auction reserve prices in the same township were RM648k-RM800k. List.my shows Taman Kota Sri Ahmad Shah recorded 555 subsale transactions (2021–2026), overall median RM548k and RM205 psf, with 84 single-storey semi-D and 16 double-storey semi-D transactions visible in the township summary. Because exact public transaction rows for semi-Ds are limited, this is a size-adjusted estimate anchored to current asking prices and auction reserves rather than a strict sold-comps regression. Price per sqft is based on built-up area (RM690,000 / 2,497 sqft ≈ RM276 psf).
